code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let t_opt = io.read_line()
  let t = match t_opt
  when Some(line)
    string.trim(line)
  when None
    ""
  end

  let body = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(body)

  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok_opt = tokens.get(i)
    match tok_opt
    when Some(tok)
      if tok == t
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      i = tokens.len()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println("count=#{count}")
  Ok(())
end
